breadcrumbSchemaTemplate._comment: Generate one BreadcrumbList per page that has a breadcrumb array. Replace itemListElement using the page's breadcrumb data with 1-based position indexes.

itemListElement.name: {{breadcrumb[2].name — omit this ListItem if breadcrumb has only 2 items}}

notes: TBD: streetAddress and postalCode in LocalBusiness JSON-LD — fill in once a physical address is confirmed.
TBD: sameAs array in LocalBusiness JSON-LD — add Google Business Profile URL, Yelp, Facebook, and any other authoritative profiles once accounts are set up.
ogImage path /assets/images/og-image.webp is a placeholder — create a 1200×630 branded OG image before launch.
/privacy and /terms carry robots: noindex, follow and low sitemap priority (0.1) per instructions; they are still included in sitemap.xml.
Blog changefreq is set to 'weekly' to signal frequent content updates; revise to 'monthly' if the blog is infrequently updated.
Site URL https://dixonpaintingco.com is a placeholder — confirm domain and update all canonicalUrl, JSON-LD, and sitemap entries before launch.

BreadcrumbList JSON-LD should be injected into the <head> of each nested page alongside the standard meta tags; homepage and /services, /service-areas, /gallery, /about, /blog, /contact (single-level) only need a 2-item breadcrumb.
Consider adding a Service schema (https://schema.org/Service) on each service subpage for additional rich-result eligibility.
Consider adding a FAQPage schema on high-intent pages (/services/interior-painting, /services/exterior-painting, /contact) once FAQ content is written.
